page.content: In the Asia-Pacific region for the certification exams conducted by Chegg Inc in January 2024, the overall performance exhibited a pass rate of 82% with a total of 28,000 candidates; 23,140 of these candidates passed, generating a revenue of ¥6,150M, representing a year-over-year change of 19%, and a market share of 60%. Specifically, CertificationA had a pass rate of 85% with 10,000 candidates, where 8,500 passed, contributing ¥1,500M in revenue with a 5% year-over-year change and 20% market share; CertificationB recorded a pass rate of 78% from 8,000 candidates, resulting in 6,240 passing, yielding ¥1,200M with a 15% year-over-year change. CertificationC achieved a pass rate of 90% with 6,000 candidates, where 5,400 passed, generating ¥1,000M in revenue with a 10% year-over-year change; CertificationD had a pass rate of 75%, with 4,000 candidates, 3,000 passing, and revenue of ¥800M, reflecting a 3% year-over-year change.

lines.text: In the Asia-Pacific region for the certification exams conducted by Chegg Inc in January 2024, the overall performance
exhibited a pass rate of 82% with a total of 28,000 candidates; 23,140 of these candidates passed, generating a revenue of
¥6,150M, representing a year-over-year change of 19%, and a market share of 60%. Specifically, CertificationA had a pass rate
of 85% with 10,000 candidates, where 8,500 passed, contributing ¥1,500M in revenue with a 5% year-over-year change and
20% market share; CertificationB recorded a pass rate of 78% from 8,000 candidates, resulting in 6,240 passing, yielding
¥1,200M with a 15% year-over-year change. CertificationC achieved a pass rate of 90% with 6,000 candidates, where 5,400
passed, generating ¥1,000M in revenue with a 10% year-over-year change; CertificationD had a pass rate of 75%, with 4,000
candidates, 3,000 passing, and revenue of ¥800M, reflecting a 3% year-over-year change.

page.content: For the overall pass rates in 2024, CertificationA maintained an 86% pass rate from 11,000 candidates, yielding 9,460 passers and ¥1,800M in revenue with a 6% year-over-year increase; CertificationB showed an 80% pass rate with 9,500 candidates, 7,790 passing, and ¥1,700M revenue; CertificationC achieved a 92% pass rate from 7,000 candidates, yielding 6,440 passers and ¥1,200M revenue, while CertificationD had a pass rate of 77% from 5,500 candidates with 4,235 passing and ¥1,100M in revenue. The total candidates for 2024 reached 34,400, with passing candidates totaling 31,892, and revenue amounting to ¥6,900M, with a projected year-over-year change of 20%, achieving a market share of 25% and encompassing four certification types.
